summary: Selected Home protocol template archive/restore management as the next UI regression surface. Write was not selected because WriteCaptureRegression already shipped as Batch 2; Train was not selected because TrainRegression already shipped as Batch 3. Patterns and localization layout remain deferred until they have a concrete UI contract or reviewed-translation/layout risk. Queued owlory-ui-regression-batch-4-home-protocol-archive-restore with a narrow implementation target: seed one Home protocol template, verify it appears active, archive it through an explicit protocol-level affordance, verify it moves to Archived Protocols, restore it, and verify it returns active.

contract_status_changes.before: The maintained UI regression lane had TodayContinueRegression, WriteCaptureRegression, and TrainRegression, but no selected next Lane 2 surface.
contract_status_changes.after: Home protocol template archive/restore management is selected for Batch 4 and queued as owlory-ui-regression-batch-4-home-protocol-archive-restore. The implementation slice must add HomeProtocolRegression and make ui-regression DOMAIN=home without changing make ui-smoke.

residual_risks: This triage does not implement XCUITests, seed data, accessibility identifiers, or Makefile DOMAIN=home support; those belong to the queued implementation slice.
This triage does not claim running-app, screenshot, device, or TestFlight proof.
Home protocol Batch 4 is deliberately limited to template archive/restore management. Active-run lifecycle, schedule labels, step revert, and per-step archive remain out of scope.
Write and Train can receive later regression batches, but they were not selected here because their first Lane 2 batches already exist.
recommended_next_reason: Supervisor dry-run selects the queued Batch 4 implementation slice. Its scope is narrow, concrete, and tied to recent Home protocol archive affordance work.
